tools.name: authentication.appkeyPatch
tools.description: Pass an app key to mark it as compromised. This may be submitted by the app owner or a concerned party that has optained the compromised app key.

tools.name: authentication.appkeyPost
tools.description: Request a new app key by passing username and password for app account

tools.name: authentication.appkeyPut
tools.description: Pass your app key to deactivate the key

tools.name: authentication.authAppkeyPatch
tools.description: Pass an app key to mark it as compromised. This may be submitted by the app owner or a concerned party that has optained the compromised app key.

tools.name: authentication.authAppkeyPost
tools.description: Request a new app key by passing username and password for app account

tools.name: authentication.authAppkeyPut
tools.description: Pass your app key to deactivate the key

tools.name: authentication.authAuthkeyGet
tools.description: Obtain auth key for user that has provided their username and password to login to your app. (or to obtain an auth key for a script like IFTTT)

tools.name: authentication.authAuthkeyPatch
tools.description: Mark user auth key as compromised

tools.name: authentication.authAuthkeyPost
tools.description: Obtain auth key for user that has provided their username and password to login to your app. (or to obtain an auth key for a script like IFTTT)

tools.name: authentication.authAuthkeyPut
tools.description: Deactivate auth key for user logging them out of your application

tools.name: authentication.authkeyGet
tools.description: Obtain auth key for user that has provided their username and password to login to your app. (or to obtain an auth key for a script like IFTTT)

tools.name: authentication.authkeyPatch
tools.description: Mark user auth key as compromised

tools.name: authentication.authkeyPost
tools.description: Obtain auth key for user that has provided their username and password to login to your app. (or to obtain an auth key for a script like IFTTT)

tools.name: authentication.authkeyPut
tools.description: Deactivate auth key for user logging them out of your application

tools.name: authentication.authVerifyotpGet
tools.description: Verifies YubiKey OTP for authenticated user

tools.name: kKid.kkidAllowanceGet
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can view allowance balance and allowance transactions for a given user provided that they are within the masterID account of the authenticated user.

tools.name: kKid.kkidAllowancePost
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can add an allowance transaction to a given user.

tools.name: kKid.kkidApnsPost
tools.description: subscribes/unsubscribes/registers for apns push notifications

tools.name: kKid.kkidChorelistDelete
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can delete a chore for the given chore id under authenticated user's master account

tools.name: kKid.kkidChorelistGet
tools.description:
By passing in the appropriate options, you can search for
chores assigned to a given user within the authenticated user's master account

tools.name: kKid.kkidChorelistPost
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can add a chore to given kid username under authenticated user's master account

tools.name: kKid.kkidChorelistPut
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate options, you can update the fields of a specific core within the authenticated user's master account

tools.name: kKid.kkidMasteruserPost
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method creates a new user with master account access. (The use of this method is restricted to Superusers ONLY)

tools.name: kKid.kkidShareGet
tools.description: Create share link

tools.name: kKid.kkidUserGet
tools.description: Gets user info for authenticated user

tools.name: kKid.kkidUserlistDelete
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method deletes the specified user. (This function is restricted to Superusers ONLY)

tools.name: kKid.kkidUserlistGet
tools.description:
By passing in the appropriate options, you can search for
users within the authenticated user's master account

tools.name: kKid.kkidUserlistPost
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method creates a new user and assigns it to the master account of the authenticated user. By default this user will have chores and allowance access.

tools.name: kKid.kkidUserlistPut
tools.description: By passing in the appropriate variables this method updates the user's profile

tools.name: kKid.kkidWishlistDelete
tools.description: Delete item from wishlist

tools.name: kKid.kkidWishlistGet
tools.description: Get list of wishlist items

tools.name: kKid.kkidWishlistPost
tools.description: Add item to kid's wishlist

tools.name: kKid.kkidWishlistPut
tools.description: Update item on kid's wishlist

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
